name: Speed (Long Range)
tooltip: The character's speed when moving with the D-PAD away from their opponent.

name: Underwater Speed (Long Range)
tooltip: The character's underwater speed when moving with the D-PAD away from their opponent.

name: Speed (Close Range)
tooltip: The character's speed when approaching their opponent with the D-PAD.

name: Underwater Speed (Close Range)
tooltip: The character's underwater speed when approaching their opponent with the D-PAD.

name: Underwater Dash Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when dashing underwater (X).

name: Dragon Dash Speed
tooltip: The character's horizontal speed when Dragon Dashing (L2 + X) directly towards their opponent.

name: Free Dragon Dash Speed
tooltip: The character's horizontal speed when doing a Dragon Dash (L2 + X) freely.

name: Vertical Free Dragon Dash Speed
tooltip: The character's vertical speed when doing a Dragon Dash (L2 + X) freely.

name: Vertical Dragon Dash Speed
tooltip: The character's vertical speed when Dragon Dashing (L2 + X) directly towards their opponent.

name: Ascending Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when moving upwards (R1).

name: Descending Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when moving downwards (R2).

name: Z-Burst Dash Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when performing a Z-Burst Dash.

name: Dragon Ascend Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when quickly moving upwards (R1 + R1).

name: Dragon Descend Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when quickly moving downwards (R2 + R2).

name: Dash Velocity
tooltip: The character's directional speed (when holding DOWN

name: Jumping Speed
tooltip: The character's speed when jumping from the ground (R1).

name: Dragon Dash Velocity
tooltip: The character's directional speed when doing a Dragon Dash (when holding DOWN
